violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Ice machine requires a cleaning. Black bacterial growth observed.--Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Cabinets and and handles are dirty and require a more frequent cleaning.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --No sanitizer buckets for wiping clothes was made up or being used at time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors and walls require a thorough cleaning.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. - Mop not hung to drip and dry when not in use. Mop was left in dirty mop water.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Cabinet doors/faces and handles require a more frequent and thorough cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vent hood and ceiling vents require a more frequent cleaning.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. - Mop sink not draining.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors, walls and ceiling throughout the kitchen in serious need of a deep cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
